video.title: Our Source of Strength - Christian Ayala
video.description:
David testifies that God is the One who lights the darkness of our lives, giving guidance, strength, and the power to overcome obstacles that would otherwise defeat us. Because the Lord equips, protects, and establishes the path of those who trust Him, believers can walk forward with confidence knowing that every victory ultimately comes from God.
Scripture: 2 Samuel 22 : 29
